scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run verify:contrast && npm run lint && npm run verify:visual && npm run verify:a11y
scripts.verify:visual:update: npm run build && playwright test tests/visual/screenshots.pw.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.verify:a11y:update: npm run build && cross-env UPDATE_A11Y_BASELINE=1 playwright test tests/visual/a11y.pw.ts --workers=1 --update-snapshots
scripts.verify:auth-visual: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.auth.config.ts tests/visual/auth-screenshots.pw.ts
scripts.verify:auth-visual:update: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.auth.config.ts tests/visual/auth-screenshots.pw.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.verify:auth-a11y: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.auth.config.ts tests/visual/auth-a11y.pw.ts
scripts.verify:auth-a11y:update: npm run build && cross-env UPDATE_AUTH_A11Y_BASELINE=1 playwright test -c playwright.auth.config.ts tests/visual/auth-a11y.pw.ts --workers=1
scripts.verify:creator-audit: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.creator-audit.config.ts
scripts.db:migrate: echo Run SQL in Supabase Dashboard. See sql/README.md and src/docs/SUPABASE_SCHEMA.md.
scripts.backup:all: npm run db:backup && npm run storage:backup
